title: sedum rosea subsp. integrifolium
intro: Sedum rosea subsp. integrifolium, also known as Rose Sedum or Rose orpine, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sedum rosea subsp. integrifolium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves and stems.
